events.title: Gnaoua World Music Festival
events.description: One of Morocco's most iconic events. Spiritual Gnaoua music and trance dances take over the entire medina and port. Free outdoor stages all weekend.

events.title: Mawazine Festival, Rabat
events.description: One of the world's biggest music festivals. Massive free outdoor stages along the Rabat coast. International headliners + Arab world stars. 2M+ attendees.

events.title: Jazzablanca, Casablanca
events.description: Morocco's premier jazz and world music festival, held in Casablanca's chic Anfa Park. International jazz acts + local talent.

events.title: Rose Festival, El Kelaa M'Gouna
events.description: The Damask rose harvest celebrated in the Dades Valley. Parades, traditional Berber music + dance, artisan markets, and rose-everything. Day trip from Marrakech.

events.title: Eid al-Fitr — End of Ramadan
events.description: Nationwide celebrations marking the end of Ramadan. Night markets, traditional music, communal prayers at dawn, and extraordinary street atmosphere particularly in Fez and Chefchaouen.

events.title: Marrakech Biennale
events.description: Avant-garde contemporary art, literature and film across the Medina. Pop-up exhibitions, workshops, and debates. Free outdoor installations. Runs through May.

events.title: L'Boulevard Festival
events.description: Underground festival showcasing Morocco's hip-hop, rap, reggae and rock scenes. Massive platform for emerging Moroccan urban artists. Expect insane energy.

events.title: Tangier Photography Days
events.description: Annual street photography festival in Tangier's medina. Workshops with leading Moroccan photographers, outdoor gallery along the harbour promenade.

events.title: Festival of World Sacred Music, Fez
events.description: Gathering of musicians, scholars and artists from across the world in the UNESCO-listed Fez medina. Free outdoor concerts at Bab Makina. Runs 10 days.

events.title: Chefchaouen Blue Market
events.description: Regular Thursday souk in the blue city. Local artisans, Rif mountain weavers, and regional food producers fill the Plaza Uta el-Hammam. Best photo opportunity in the city.

events.title: Essaouira Kitesurfing Competition
events.description: Annual kitesurfing and windsurfing championship on the Essaouira beach. Spectator-friendly with food trucks and live music on the beach. Morocco's windiest city earns its reputation.
